title: alnus glauca
intro: Alnus glauca, also known as the grey alder or smooth alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of arthritis and gout, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. In herbal preparations, Alnus glauca is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
